name: Poisonous Viper
desc: You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon it, or if your opponent controls no monsters, Special Summon it to their field in Defense Position instead. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Take 500 damage. If this card is banished, or sent to the GY by card effect: You can target 1 Set Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy it. It cannot be activated in response to this effect's activation. You can only use this effect of "Poisonous Viper" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon it, or if your opponent controls no monsters, Special Summon it to their field in Defense Position instead. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Take 500 damage. If this card is banished, or sent to the GY by card effect: You can target 1 Set Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy it. It cannot be activated in response to this effect's activation. You can only use this effect of "Poisonous Viper" once per turn.
eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon it, or if your opponent controls no monsters, Special Summon it to their field in Defense Position instead. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Take 500 damage. If this card is banished, or sent to the GY by card effect: You can target 1 Set Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy it. action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-down Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-down Trap Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your hand to your opponent's field
